since_last: 52% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.27%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.00% · Gold +0.53% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 52% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.27%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.27%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.37%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ASML is the standout at +4.31%
cards.body: Leaders: ASML +4.31%, AMAT +4.08%, CGNX +3.78%, KLAC +3.48%, LRCX +3.43%. Laggards: BABA -1.51%, AI -0.94%, PLTR -0.90%, ZS -0.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.65% at $207.14
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
